title: Opening for Production Engineer at Rahu Catalysts

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Rahu Catalysts
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts:
Rahu Catalysts is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
